_meta.name: DPPA baseline (EVN TOU, for post-processing)
_meta.description: Same as Scenario A. Dispatch profile used as input to dppa_settlement.py to compute DPPA CfD revenue (Excel Scenario 3). Strike price: VND 1,800/kWh (confirm Decree 57 ceiling compliance).
_meta.dppa_note: Decree 57 ceiling for south ground-mounted solar+BESS: VND 1,149.86/kWh. Confirm whether project uses private-wire or grid-connected DPPA structure.
